title: Creamy Salmon Italian Soup
description: A rich and comforting soup featuring salmon and a hint of Italian flavors. Perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add salmon, cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until cooked through.
Remove salmon from pot and set aside.
Add fish sauce, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper to pot. Stir to combine.
Pour in broth and bring to a simmer.
Return salmon to pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in heavy cream and cook until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley or chives if desired.
Cook time will vary depending on salmon thickness.
Adjust seasoning to taste before serving.
